/usr/bin/ar qc libaxiomdb_core.a CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/buffer/buffer_pool_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/buffer/lru_k_evictor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/catalog/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/catalog/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/catalog/tuple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/catalog/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/common/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/engine/classic_storage_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/engine/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/exec/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/exec/expression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/exec/operators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/exec/planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/index/bplus_tree_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/lsm/bloom_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/lsm/lsm_memtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/lsm/lsm_sstable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/lsm/lsm_storage_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/parser/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/recovery/crash_recovery_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/recovery/log_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/storage/disk_storage_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/storage/heap_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/storage/slotted_page_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/txn/concurrency_lock_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/axiomdb_core.dir/src/txn/txn_manager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libaxiomdb_core.a
